name: Planner shows a 7-column week grid and week navigation works
description: The planner renders a weekly calendar as seven day columns laid out side-by-side in one row, and clicking 'next week' actually shifts the visible date range forward.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to load
Click the Study Planner link in the sidebar

Verify the calendar shows seven day columns (Mon through Sun) arranged side-by-side in a single horizontal row, each column with a day header, plus visible previous-week and next-week navigation controls
Read and remember the currently displayed week date range
Verify the displayed week date range changes to a later range than the one remembered, confirming week navigation re-rendered the grid rather than staying static
